purpose: Minimal C++ throw/catch fixture for owned unwinder lane

expected_status.reason: owned_unwind_abi performs phase-1 search, records phase-2 cursor mutations, validates x86_64 handler-frame CFI/stack state, and has a non-returning landing-pad transfer path. The static minimal_throw_catch fixture embeds local _Unwind_* symbols via -static-libgcc, so LD_PRELOAD alone cannot prove interposition ownership for that binary.
expected_status.when_implemented: owned transfer is covered by focused ABI tests; replacement-level C++ proof needs a fixture whose _Unwind_* symbols resolve to FrankenLibC rather than static libgcc text.

under_frankenlibc.expected_current: native catch output may pass through the fixture's embedded static libgcc unwinder; this is not accepted as proof that FrankenLibC owned _Unwind_RaiseException
under_frankenlibc.expected_phase2: PASS: exception caught correctly with _Unwind_* resolved to FrankenLibC-owned symbols

acceptance_criteria: Owned phase-1 search discovers personality/LSDA-backed frames without host unwinder delegation
Owned phase-2 cleanup can record SetGR/SetIP cursor mutations and validate x86_64 landing-pad transfer descriptors
Bad x86_64 landing-pad contexts return explicit typed fatal diagnostics
Under frankenlibc standalone with owned _Unwind_* resolution: exception propagates without abort
